beats.narration: A casting is metal that froze in place. Nothing refines it afterward, so what the mold left behind is what arrives under your probe.

payload.title: CASTINGS
payload.sub: What the mold made is what you inspect.

beats.narration: Know the family: shrinkage in the last metal to freeze, rounded gas porosity, hot tears at section changes, cold shuts at the surface.
Coarse cast grains scatter the beam into grass, climbing roughly with frequency to the fourth power. Test castings slow: 1 megahertz strides over the grains.

payload.heading: Same casting, two frequencies
payload.note: LOWER FREQUENCY: GRASS DIES, BACK ECHO RETURNS

beats.narration: Watch the back echo. Healthy means sound is crossing the wall. Sinking with nothing discrete can mean microshrinkage soaking up the beam. Record it.
So here's the rule: a dead screen never means no defects. It may mean no test. Report what's there.

payload.sub: It may mean no test at all.
